title: 16 Personalities Describing Their Ideal Partner
text: I need to be with someone who's a big fan of amusement parks cuz they're going to be getting themselves into an emotional roller coaster my ideal partner is someone who can go with the flow who can let loose be spontaneous and not sweat the small stuff so the complete opposite of me I want to be with someone who when they ask me what do you want to do and I say oh I don't know what do you want to do doesn't come back at me with I don't know what do you want to do it would be like myself I can't handle that I need to be with someone with an IQ of at least 120 if it's lower than that she'll never understand my sense of humor that was a joke I personally would love to date a lady who was a martial arts master with super strength and added bonus if she can fly I guess I need to find someone who fits into my 10year plan because I really don't like having to rework the plan based on unexpected variables such as other people or reality in general my ideal partner someone who I like a lot what do you think I'm going to get together with someone I don't like is this a trick question at this point the only quality I'm looking for in a potential partner is someone who can handle my personality and that one thing really limits the dating pool let me tell you I'm not sure how to describe my ideal partner but I'll know when I find her and all my friends family and close acquaintances have told me what they think of her I don't really know what qualities I'm looking for but definitely not my ex-girlfriend's best friend or my best friend's ex-girlfriend I learned both of those the hard way and she's got to have super speed telekinesis lightning bolts out of her fingertips I have a running list of qualities that I want in a partner I hope you have some time because this list is like 30 pages long my ideal partner is someone who's been investing the maximum amount into a retirement fund for the last several years because there's nothing more romantic than not being poor when you're old I'd love to find a lady friend who enjoys reading we could each get our own book sit on the couch and just read relatively close to each other but no talking please I'm looking for someone who won't take from anybody unless it's me

title: 16 Personalities Describing Their Ideal Partner
text: u're old I'd love to find a lady friend who enjoys reading we could each get our own book sit on the couch and just read relatively close to each other but no talking please I'm looking for someone who won't take from anybody unless it's me thighs of Steel that could choke a man to death my ideal partner would be my best friend but of course she got married a few years ago so I guess I'll just have to find someone similar to her if someone were to describe me as her ideal partner then that would make her my ideal partner how would someone describe you [Music] so all of that describes my ideal partner but realistically I mean I don't know maybe just someone who's chill hey thanks for watching you know I've got more 16 personalities videos then you can shake a stick at on this channel if you want to watch another one click right here or if you want to binge the whole playlist I got you covered right here and if one of these types in the video reminded you of a friend or something share this video with them till next time stay cool and attractive
